name: Davis Credit Repair Co. LLC
description_short: Davis Credit Repair Co. LLC is a Michigan-based credit repair firm operating since 2020, offering dispute services and credit report analysis to help consumers remove errors and negative items.
description_long:
Davis Credit Repair Co. LLC was incorporated in 2020 and operates from Grosse Pointe Park, Michigan, with a team of 10 employees. The company is registered under multiple business names including Davis Credit Co and operates under the SIC code 7299 (Miscellaneous personal service), with Yellow Pages categorization under Financing and Credit. Their online presence includes a Google Business profile and email contact at Info@asapcreditrepairusa.com.

Based on the available directory information, Davis Credit Repair Co. LLC appears to operate as a credit repair service provider focused on helping consumers address errors and negative items on their credit reports. The company's categorization under credit repair and financing services suggests they engage in dispute processes with credit bureaus and furnishers. The inclusion of a "Try it for free" prompt on their listing indicates they offer initial consultations or assessments at no charge to prospective clients.

The company's relatively recent incorporation date (2020) and modest team size (10 employees) suggest a smaller, localized operation compared to larger national credit repair chains. Their presence on multiple business listing platforms and a dedicated Google Business page indicates basic digital marketing and local business development efforts. The availability of multiple contact methods (phone and email) suggests customer service accessibility.

Without access to detailed service descriptions, pricing, or customer feedback from the provided source material, a complete assessment of their service quality, dispute success rates, or competitive positioning cannot be fully established. Prospective clients should request specific information about their dispute methodology, estimated timeline for results, and fee structures before engaging services. As with all credit repair services, consumers should verify that the company complies with the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) and state-specific credit repair regulations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Located in established Grosse Pointe Park area with local accessibility
Offers free trial or initial consultation per "Try it for free" messaging
10-person team suggests dedicated local customer service capacity
Multiple contact options available (phone: 313-662-2288, email: Info@asapcreditrepairusa.com)
Established business with incorporation in 2020, suggesting operational stability
cons: Minimal information available about specific services, success rates, or dispute methodology from provided source
No pricing transparency or fee structure disclosed in available directory listing
Website content does not demonstrate customer testimonials or documented results
Limited digital footprint—relies primarily on business directory listings rather than comprehensive company website
No information available regarding CROA compliance or state licensing documentation
best_for: Michigan residents seeking local credit repair services with direct customer contact
Consumers willing to use a free initial consultation before committing to paid services
Small business owners or individuals with straightforward credit report errors needing local support
diagnosis: Davis Credit Repair Co. LLC is best for Michigan residents seeking a local credit repair option with accessible phone and email support. The primary caveat is the extremely limited publicly available information about their specific services, success rates, pricing, and regulatory compliance—interested consumers should request detailed documentation and verify CROA adherence before engaging paid services.
services: Free initial credit analysis or consultation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 15001 Kercheval Ave, Grosse Pointe Park, MI 48230
